About Me # I’m a Cloud Security & IT Professional with extensive experience in designing and implementing secure cloud infrastructures, managing identity and access controls, and automating compliance frameworks.
Expertise # Cloud Security: AWS Security, Azure Security, GCP Security Identity & Access Management: IAM policies, RBAC, Zero Trust architectures DevSecOps: Security automation, CI/CD pipeline security, Infrastructure as Code Compliance: SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA frameworks Professional Background # With a focus on building resilient and secure systems, I’ve helped organizations:
Implement Zero Trust network architectures Automate IAM policy management at scale Design and deploy security-first cloud infrastructures Establish compliance automation pipelines Current Focus # I’m passionate about:
Building automated security controls Researching cloud-native security patterns Sharing knowledge through technical writing Contributing to open-source security tools Let’s Connect # LinkedIn: elkana-langat GitHub: elkana-langat Email: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com
title: About
